{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":10}","has_more":true,"total":299},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7469113098940564249","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本算是我在番茄看的最好看的都市影综了，男女主都写得很有思想，感情戏很细腻不无脑，虽然有系统但是存在感不大，男主基本靠自己的能力发展，比那种开局无脑文好太多了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1739048945,"group_id":"7356471937050102808","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0QoPtDtVGBLJ4CiUVl8BV0ELgZ9OHVSkSx3A5VM0pf+","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1956751424095555","user_name":"魏武丶曹孟德"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1956751424095555","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7356471937050102808","book_info":{"abstract":"　　天崩开局，遇上病入膏肓的小富婆陈南星，这不忽悠天理何在，系统在没意外，枪出如龙贼痛快！
